meanings.usage: 指个人亲身经历过的事情，或从实践中获得的知识和技能
指停止工作，结束职业生涯
指商业企业或商业组织
指进行制造或修理工作的地方
指多余的或用于替换的
指在记忆中想起过去的事情
指达到预期的目标或目的
指把钱存起来以备将来使用

phrases.usage: 表示过去的习惯性动作或状态，现在已不再继续

examples.en: He used to work in a small shop.
examples.zh: 他过去在一家小商店工作。

examples.en: Frank used to make spare parts for aeroplanes.
Frank was telling me about his experiences.
In 1958 he bought a small workshop of his own.
examples.zh: 1958年他买下了自己的一个小车间。

examples.en: In his twenties Frank used to make spare parts for aeroplanes.
examples.zh: Frank在二十多岁时制造飞机配件。

examples.en: In a few years the small workshop had become a large factory.
examples.zh: 几年之后这个小车间变成了一个大工厂。

examples.en: He remembered his hard early years and the long road to success.
examples.zh: 他想起了早年艰难的岁月和通往成功的漫漫长路。

examples.en: She wanted him to repair their grandson's bicycle!
examples.zh: 她想让他修理他们孙子的自行车！

examples.en: At that time he used to work fourteen hours a day.
examples.zh: 在那时他每天工作十四个小时。

grammar.title: used to 的用法
grammar.definition: used to 表示过去经常性的动作或存在的状态，而现在已经不再发生或存在了
grammar.structure: 主语 + used to + 动词原形
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去的习惯、状态或行为，与现在形成对比

examples.en: He used to work in a small shop.
examples.zh: 他过去在一家小商店工作（现在不在了）。

examples.en: Frank used to make spare parts for aeroplanes.
She used to be a teacher.

grammar.title: 一般过去时
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去发生的事情，常与 yesterday, last week, in 1958 等时间状语连用

examples.en: In 1958 he bought a small workshop of his own.
examples.zh: 1958年他买下了自己的一个小车间。

examples.en: Frank smiled when he remembered his hard early years.
examples.zh: Frank想起早年艰难的岁月时笑了。

grammar.title: when引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: when引导的时间状语从句表示主句的动作发生在从句动作的过程中
grammar.structure: 主句 + when + 从句（过去时）
grammar.usage: when 从句常用一般过去时，主句可用过去进行时或一般过去时

examples.en: Frank smiled when he remembered his hard early years.
examples.zh: Frank想起早年艰难的岁月时笑了。

examples.en: He was still smiling when the door opened.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + used to + 动词原形

original.en: He used to work in a small shop.
original.zh: 他过去在一家小商店工作。

imitations.en: She used to live in Beijing.
I used to play tennis when I was young.

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing + when + 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: He was still smiling when the door opened.

imitations.en: She was reading when I came in.
They were having dinner when the phone rang.
imitations.zh: 电话响的时候他们正在吃晚饭。

sentencePatterns.pattern: In + 年份/时间, 主语 + 动词过去式

original.en: In 1958 he bought a small workshop of his own.
original.zh: 1958年他买下了自己的一个小车间。

imitations.en: In 2020, she started her own business.
In his thirties, he became a manager.
imitations.zh: 在他三十多岁时，他成为了一名经理。
